{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Yerin's Path
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] has a [[Path]] that is usually unrecognized.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
